title: Ipomoea hartwegii
taxonomy: Ipomoea hartwegii is classified within the plant kingdom as a species of flowering plant. It belongs to the family Convolvulaceae. This family includes a wide range of other flowering plants commonly known as morning glories. The genus Ipomoea is a large and diverse group of plants that are primarily native to the Americas.
